name: Tiffany Valentine-Ray
description:
The wicked ex-girlfriend-turned-doll of a notorious killer, Tiffany spends her time roaming the world trying to find a remedy for her dilemma. With her ex’s magical influence waning, Tiffany finds herself experiencing more and more moments where she is not in control of her body, being only a spectator as her soul phases between planes. This condition has resulted in her being “stuck” in unsavory circumstances.

(Thumbnail by: Noblood)
creator: Animeisflameproof
